series_metadata.series_description: Child Support Enforcement tracking and reporting system (SETS)devised to document attempts to obtain adequate child support services. Services include establishingpaternity, locating an absent parent, tracking child support payments, collecting licensesuspension/revocation and new hire reporting data which is used to enforce child support obligations,and absent parent data reported to the IRS to intercept tax refunds.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: reports printed from system superseded, obsolete or replaced ; Electronic: SETS data in system
